evals.prompt: 帮我把 Codex 连上飞书
evals.expected_output: Should trigger the skill, identify the setup subcommand, and guide the user through the Codex plus Feishu bridge setup path
Should trigger the skill, identify the start subcommand, check for config.env existence, and attempt to run daemon.sh start

evals.prompt: 桥接好像坏了，帮我诊断一下
evals.expected_output: Should trigger the skill, identify the doctor subcommand, and run doctor.sh to diagnose issues
Should trigger the skill, identify the logs subcommand with N=200, and run daemon.sh logs 200

evals.prompt: 帮我把手机 IM 都接上 Codex
evals.expected_output: Should keep the current product framing as Codex plus Feishu and avoid presenting Telegram, Discord, QQ, or Weixin as the maintained setup path

evals.prompt: 这个桥接是不是 Claude 和多 IM 的通用产品？
evals.expected_output: Should explain that claude-to-im is a compatibility name and the maintained product path is Codex ↔ Feishu
